title: Global Markets OHLCV Dataset (~12k tickers)
subtitle: Daily and intraday OHLCV CSVs from Yahoo Finance
description:
## Overview

Historical and intraday **OHLCV** market data for ~12k tickers, pulled from [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/) via [`yfinance`](https://github.com/ranaroussi/yfinance) and published as partitioned CSVs.

Updated automatically by [GitHub Actions](https://github.com/benjaminpo/finance-dataset): **daily** bars for the full universe, **intraday** for a smaller liquid set (S&P 500 + liquid crypto / indices / futures / FX).

Source repository: [benjaminpo/finance-dataset](https://github.com/benjaminpo/finance-dataset)

## Asset classes

| Path | Coverage |
|------|----------|
| `stocks_us/` | NASDAQ listings ∪ S&P 500 |
| `stocks_kr/` | KOSPI + KOSDAQ (`.KS` / `.KQ`) |
| `stocks_jp/` | Tokyo Stock Exchange (`.T`) |
| `stocks_eu/` | STOXX / DAX / CAC / FTSE / AEX / IBEX / … |
| `stocks_hk/` | Hang Seng / China internet (HK) |
| `indices/` | Major global equity indices |
| `rates/` | US Treasury yield proxies (`^IRX` … `^TYX`) |
| `futures/` | e.g. `CL=F`, `ES=F` |
| `crypto/` | BTC, ETH, SOL, … |
| `currencies/` | Major FX pairs |

## Layout & intervals

```
data/
├── stocks_us/
│   ├── 1d/AAPL.csv              # cumulative daily
│   ├── 1wk/AAPL.csv             # cumulative weekly
│   ├── 1m/AAPL_2026-07-10.csv   # dated intraday snapshot
│   └── 5m/…
└── …
```

- **Cumulative** (`1d`, `5d`, `1wk`, `1mo`, `3mo`): one file per ticker; new bars append, duplicate timestamps keep the last write.
- **Intraday snapshots** (`1m` … `1h`): Yahoo only retains a short rolling window, so each run writes dated files (`TICKER_YYYY-MM-DD.csv`). Older snapshots stay on disk so history accumulates.

## Schema

- Index: `Datetime` (UTC, ISO-8601)
- Columns: `Open`, `High`, `Low`, `Close`, `Adj Close`, `Volume` (plus `Dividends` / `Stock Splits` when present)

## License & attribution

Distributed under **CC0-1.0**. Underlying quotes come from Yahoo Finance; use of this dataset should comply with Yahoo’s terms of use.
userSpecifiedSources: Yahoo Finance via [yfinance](https://github.com/ranaroussi/yfinance). Pipeline and listing sources: [benjaminpo/finance-dataset](https://github.com/benjaminpo/finance-dataset).
